LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_Backpack_Small.label: doberkin sac à dos
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_Backpack_Small.descript: A standard doberkin sac à dos which offers optimal carry capacity for storing all kinds of items.
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_KineticAmmoPack.label: cinétique ammo sac
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_KineticAmmoPack.descrip: A steel-framed backpack reinforced wtih kevlar, mainly used to store 850 rounds of ammunition for the exclusive use of doberkin heavy weapons.
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_BatteryPack.label: pack d’énergie avancé DFSD
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_BatteryPack.description: A pack of microfusion battery reinforced with layers of plasteel plates, capable of storing 500 points of energy for the exclusive use of doberkin energy weapons.
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_MicrofusionPack.label: ADV microfusion sac
LanguageData.Doberkin_Apparel_MicrofusionPack.descrip: A sac à dos primarily used to store ammunition for énergie-type lourd weapons, capable of storing 50 microfusion cells.
